pubmed_links: [Gonzalez DA et al. (2018) Arf6 activator Efa6/PSD3 modulates ethanol consumption in Drosophila and humans](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/28607459/);[Wilkerson MD et al. (2024) Protein-coding variants associated with suicide attempt in U.S. Army soldiers](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/38141912/)
summary: PSD3 encodes a brain-enriched Arf6 guanine exchange factor preferentially expressed in the prefrontal cortex; variants in PSD3 have been associated with increased alcohol consumption and dependence in adolescents and adults, and more recently with suicide attempt risk in a large military cohort. (emerging evidence)
